# Collections

Curated groupings that cut across the archive — visually distinctive specimens,
unusual textures, evidence of change, materials humans have used, field-trip batches,
and unresolved identifications.

Collections are created only when several specimens genuinely share something worth
seeing together; they will appear as the archive grows.
